who: construction project managers processing 5–15 CAD files/month
offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 CAD files/month, inefficient documentation conversion causes delays in permit approvals. We provide a streamlined converter instead of manual conversion of CAD files.
problem: Inefficient conversion of CAD files into permit packages
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try basic file conversion on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
